message:
feat(membrane): add 13 advanced statistical monitors for runtime kernel

- azuma_hoeffding: martingale concentration inequality monitoring
- bifurcation_detector: dynamical system bifurcation point detection
- birkhoff_ergodic: ergodic average convergence tracking
- borel_cantelli: probability series convergence/divergence monitoring
- dispersion_index: variance-to-mean ratio analysis
- entropy_rate: information-theoretic entropy rate estimation
- hurst_exponent: long-range dependence and self-similarity measurement
- ito_quadratic_variation: stochastic calculus quadratic variation tracking
- lempel_ziv: algorithmic complexity estimation via LZ compression
- ornstein_uhlenbeck: mean-reverting process parameter estimation
- renewal_theory: inter-arrival time distribution analysis
- spectral_gap: mixing time and convergence rate monitoring
- submodular_coverage: diminishing returns coverage optimization

Each monitor includes inline unit tests (~350-420 lines per module)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
